title: THRIFT STORE AND FURNITURE STORE - 211info
text: FURNITURE STORE THRIFT STORE AND FURNITURE STORE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Roseburg Rescue Mission operates a thrift and furniture store to provide a work program; items are supplied via vouchers for clients and are sold to the general public. Donations of clothing, furniture, and household items are welcome. 806 SE Pine Street Roseburg, OR 97470 Eligibility: Unrestricted Vouchers are for Rescue Mission guests only Hours: Store: Monday-Friday 9am-6pm, Saturday 9am-2pm Vouchers: Monday-Wednesday 1:30pm-3:30pm (541) 673-3004 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 673-3004 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Donations can also be dropped off at the warehouse deck behind the furniture store. FEES: Varies by item. DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Coos, Curry, and Douglas Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Saturday 9am-6pm Services: Clothing Vouchers Donation Drop Off Points Donation Pickups Thrift Shops If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FURNITURE STORE
